svg.title: Enclosure Cap — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
svg.desc: Scale: 2 px/mm (main views), 6 px/mm (detail insets). All dimensions in mm.
svg.text: Third-Angle Orthographic Projection | Scale: 2 px/mm (main), 6 px/mm (details) | Dims in mm
Material: ASA | Wall: 4.0 mm | Draft: 3 deg inward | Vertical edge R8, Top edge R5
(Section through side wall at ledge | 6 px/mm)

g.text: 1. Material: ASA (matte charcoal). All walls 4.0 mm uniform.
2. Draft: 3 deg inward on all four sides. Cap widest at bottom rim (Z=200), narrowest at top (Z=400).
3. Radii: R8 on all 4 vertical edges, R5 on all 4 top-face-to-side transitions, 1.0 mm chamfer on aperture edges.
4. Reveal step: 0.8 mm inset per side at bottom rim relative to tub exterior.
5. Groove: 1.7 mm wide x 3.2 mm deep, centered in wall, continuous around perimeter.
6. Snap-fit ledges: 8 total (2 per side), 15 x 2 x 2 mm, bottom face at Z=205. Permanent 90-deg catch.
7. Bag tilt: 35 deg from horizontal. Two bags stacked vertically. Print orientation: inverted (top face on build plate).
8. Funnel lip: 2.0 mm tall, 3.0 mm wide raised rim on top exterior. Funnel insert: gravity-retained, removable.
